recalls.Description: Monica Vinader has announced a recall of select 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Chain Bracelets, Necklaces, and Stud Earrings due to the presence of elevated levels of cadmium. These jewelry items feature mini heart pendants and were produced in October and November 2024. The chain bracelet measures approximately 15.3-19 cm, the necklace ranges from 41-46 cm, and the earrings each measure about 0.35 cm x 0.4 cm x 0.1 mm.
recalls.Title: Monica Vinader Recalls 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Jewelry Due to Cadmium Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Monica Vinader at 888-580-8582 from 4 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or via email at productrecall@monicavinader.com. More information is available online at www.monicavinader.com/recall-hearts or by visiting www.monicavinader.com/us and clicking on 'Recall Information' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Chain Bracelet

Images.Caption: Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Chain Bracelet (SKU YG-BL-HART-NON)
Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Chain Bracelet (SKU YG-BL-HART-NON)
Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Necklace (SKU YG-NK-HART-NON)
Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Necklace (SKU YG-NK-HART-NON)
Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Stud Earrings (SKU YG-EA-HARS-NON)

Retailers.Name: Available at Monica Vinader and Nordstrom stores, as well as online at www.monicavinader.com/us and www.nordstrom.com from January 20, 2025, to March 2025 for Monica Vinader, and from November 26, 2024, to May 2025 for Nordstrom, priced between $250 and $350.

Importers.Name: Monica Vinader Inc., of New York, New York
Monica Vinader Retail LLC, of Wilmington, Delaware

Hazards.Name: Excess cadmium levels posing toxicity risk to young children and potential health effects from prolonged skin exposure.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the jewelry immediately, keep it away from children, and contact Monica Vinader for a replacement or refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Monica Vinader recalls 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart jewelry due to cadmium risk. Learn how to return for a refund or replacement.

recalls.Description:
Innovative Designs is recalling its Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelets, specifically Models 718508MCR and 718075MCR, available in pink and green. These bracelets feature the "MINECRAFT" logo on the packaging, with model numbers located on the back. Each bracelet contains three pre-installed button cell batteries, posing a serious safety hazard for children.

The design allows easy access to the battery compartment, which can be opened by young children. This poses a significant risk of ingestion, leading to severe injuries, internal chemical burns, or even death. It is crucial for parents to ensure these items are kept away from children immediately.
recalls.Title: Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelets Recalled Due to Button Cell Battery Ingestion Risk

Images.Caption: Recalled Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelet, Model 718508MCR - Front
Recalled Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelet, Model 718508MCR – Back
Recalled Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelet, Model 718075MCR - Front
Recalled Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelet, Model 718075MCR - Back

Injuries.Name: Innovative Designs has received one report of a battery separating from the toy. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart stores nationwide from March 2025 through May 2025 for approximately $2.

Importers.Name: Innovative Designs LLC, of New York

Hazards.Name: Risk of serious injury or death from button cell battery ingestion

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bracelets and contact Innovative Designs for disposal instructions and a full refund. A photo of the disposed item must be emailed to info@innovativenyc.com to process the refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert: Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelets pose a button cell battery ingestion risk. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: Newmemo is recalling its children's ring sets due to the presence of lead and cadmium, which exceed federal safety limits. These toxic metals pose a significant risk of poisoning if ingested by young children. The sets were sold in packs of 36 rings, displayed in a pink heart-shaped case, with identifying labels on the bottom.
recalls.Title: Newmemo Children's Ring Sets Recalled Due to Lead and Cadmium Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Newmemo via email at cly2167@163.com or visit their seller profile on Amazon at https://www.amazon.com/sp?ie=UTF8&seller=AVVUCA891OMBV and select 'Ask a question.'

Images.Caption: Newmemo and "Amazon FNSKU X0034COQMP" appear on a label on the underside of the ring's packaging

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Amazon.com from January 2022 to March 2024, priced around $12.

Importers.Name: Memovan Technology Industrial Co. Limited, (dba Newmemo), of China

Remedies.Name: Stop using the rings, keep them away from children, and contact Newmemo for a full refund. Dispose of the jewelry and send a photo of the disposed product to cly2167@163.com. Newmemo and Amazon will reach out to all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: Newmemo recalls children's ring sets due to hazardous lead and cadmium levels. Immediate action required for refunds and safety.

recalls.Description: Fossil Group is recalling a braided black bracelet included in Skechers watch and jewelry gift sets due to the presence of high levels of lead and cadmium. This bracelet features a distinctive braided design and metal clasps on both ends. The accompanying watch has the code "IF2812307" on its back and is identified by the model number "SR9082".
recalls.Title: Fossil Group Issues Recall for Skechers Jewelry Gift Set Bracelet Due to Toxic Lead and Cadmium Levels
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled bracelet immediately. For assistance, contact Fossil Group at 800-842-8621, available from 8 a.m. to 8 p.m. CT Monday through Friday, and from 9:30 a.m. to 7 p.m. CT on weekends. Additional information can be found via email at info@fgservices.com or online at www.fossilgroup.com/recalls/.

Products.Name: Braided Black Bracelet from Skechers Watch and Jewelry Gift Set

Images.Caption: Back of Watch in Recalled Skechers Jewelry Gift Set With Model Number and Code

Manufacturers.Name: Fossil Group Inc., of Richardson, Texas

Retailers.Name: Available at Skechers stores across the country and online at Amazon.com, Watchstation.com, and Skechers.com from August 2023 to January 2024 for approximately $45.

Importers.Name: Fossil Partners, L.P. of Richardson, Texas

Hazards.Name: Presence of high levels of lead and cadmium in the bracelet's clasp, posing health risks.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bracelet, dispose of it, and contact the retailer for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Fossil Group recalls a black bracelet from Skechers gift sets due to toxic lead and cadmium. Immediate action recommended for consumers.
